message:
fix: guard truncate() against negative/small max and nil Process check

- pkg/hooks/executor.go: truncate() panicked with negative max (slice
  bounds out of range) and produced wrong output when max <= 3 (tried
  to subtract 3 for ellipsis from a too-small budget)
- tests/e2e/wizard_flow_e2e_test.go: cmd.Process.Kill() could nil-deref
  if the command never started before the timeout fired

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
